goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'european' food and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
